title: Transform portfolio into command-line terminal aesthetic with networking CMD interface

requirements.text: Transform the entire portfolio UI to mimic a command-line terminal interface with monospace fonts (Courier New, Consolas, or Monaco), dark terminal background (black or dark gray), green terminal text as primary color, and blinking cursor animations

quotes: isko thoda professonal and more creative bana sakta hai kya jese ki pura cmd me

acceptanceCriteria: All text uses monospace fonts typical of terminal interfaces
Background is dark terminal-style (black or dark gray)
Primary text color is terminal green (#00FF00 or similar)
Cursor animations with blinking effect are present in Hero section

requirements.text: Replace section headings with CMD-style command prompts (e.g., 'C:\Users\SubodhRam> dir Education', 'C:\Users\SubodhRam> ipconfig /all' for networking sections, 'C:\Users\SubodhRam> tasklist' for projects)

quotes: kyu ki networking me cmd hi cahlta hai na

acceptanceCriteria: Each section header displays as a CMD prompt with appropriate networking commands
Education section uses 'dir' command format
Skills/Experience sections use networking commands like 'ipconfig', 'netstat', 'ping'
Projects section uses 'tasklist' or similar command format

requirements.text: Display section content with CMD output formatting including ASCII borders, pipe characters for tables, and terminal-style lists with bullet points replaced by command output symbols (>, -, *)
acceptanceCriteria: Content cards use ASCII box-drawing characters for borders
Lists use CMD-style symbols (>, -, *) instead of traditional bullets
Tables or grids use pipe characters (|) and dashes (-) for structure
Text formatting mimics terminal output with consistent spacing

requirements.text: Add terminal-style typing animations for the Hero section where the name, title, and tagline appear character-by-character as if being typed in a CMD window
acceptanceCriteria: Hero text appears with typing animation on page load
Animation speed mimics realistic typing (50-100ms per character)
Blinking cursor follows the typing animation
Animation completes before user can interact with other elements

requirements.text: Replace the Download Resume button with a CMD-style button displaying 'C:\> download resume.pdf' with terminal green text on dark background and hover effect that adds a blinking cursor
acceptanceCriteria: Button text displays as a command prompt format
Uses terminal green color (#00FF00 or similar)
Hover state adds blinking cursor animation
Download functionality remains intact

requirements.text: Update the color scheme to use classic terminal colors: black/dark gray background, bright green (#00FF00) for primary text, white for secondary text, and yellow for highlights or warnings, removing the existing neon blue and purple theme

quotes: kyu ki networking me cmd hi cahlta hai na

acceptanceCriteria: Background is pure black or very dark gray (#0a0a0a)
Primary text is terminal green (#00FF00)
Secondary text is white or light gray
Accent color is terminal yellow for important elements
No blue or purple colors remain in the design

requirements.text: Add scanline overlay effect across the entire viewport to simulate CRT monitor appearance and enhance the retro terminal aesthetic
acceptanceCriteria: Subtle horizontal scanlines appear across the entire page
Scanlines are semi-transparent and do not obstruct readability
Effect creates authentic CRT terminal appearance
Scanlines animate slowly if performance allows

requirements.text: Replace the network lines animation with ASCII art network diagrams or flowing text characters (like Matrix-style falling characters) that represent network packets and data flow

quotes: kyu ki networking me cmd hi cahlta hai na

acceptanceCriteria: Background animation uses ASCII characters instead of SVG lines
Characters flow downward in terminal green color
Animation represents network data flow or packet transmission
Performance remains smooth with animation

requirements.text: Format Skills section to display as CMD command output with commands like 'netstat -ano' for networking skills, 'python --version' for programming languages, and 'systeminfo' for IT tools

quotes: networking me cmd hi cahlta hai na

acceptanceCriteria: Each skill category displays as output from a relevant CMD command
Networking skills use 'netstat', 'ipconfig', 'ping' command formatting
Programming skills use version check commands
Output formatting matches authentic CMD response structure

constraints: Preserve all existing content and data (education details, project information, work experience, skills, certifications)
Maintain responsive design for mobile and desktop viewing
Do not modify backend/main.mo or immutable frontend paths
Ensure text remains readable despite terminal aesthetic
nonGoals: Adding actual command-line functionality or terminal emulation
Making the portfolio interactive as a real terminal
Adding new content sections beyond redesigning existing ones
